name: Database MCP Governance Knowledge Block
description: Governance context for an MCP database tool that can query structured data under defined identity and policy boundaries.

full.governance_summary: Database access requires role-bounded query scope, clear read/write separation, and evidence sufficient for later review.

mcp_server.name: Database MCP Server
mcp_server.purpose: Query approved structured data for analysis, reporting, and workflow support.

allowed_use: Run read-only queries within approved schemas.
Generate aggregate reports when policy permits.
prohibited_use: Run write, update, delete, or schema migration queries without explicit approval.
Query personally identifiable information outside approved purpose and role scope.
Export bulk records without a human approval record.
Query across tenant or authority boundaries.

human_oversight.requirement: Human approval is required for write operations, bulk export, PII access, cross-tenant queries, or changes to query policy.

unsupported_conditions: semantic SQL analysis is requested but not implemented
external database permission proof is unavailable
